name: vibe-security
description: Audits codebases for security vulnerabilities that AI coding assistants introduce in vibe-coded apps: exposed secrets, broken database access control (Supabase RLS, Firebase rules, Convex), missing auth, client-side trust, insecure payments, supply-chain risks (slopsquatting), and Expo / React Native / Convex specific issues. One orchestrator skill plus focused per-domain skills.
